title: DispenserCauldrons
description: Allows dispensers to pick up and place liquids in cauldrons like they can with regular liquids
body:
# DispenserCauldrons

Simple plugin to allow dispensers to place and remove liquids from cauldrons

Allows configuration to disable certain liquids being added/removed from cauldrons, and to prevent dispensers interacting with cauldrons from below.

For support join the [Starshooter](https://discord.gg/dQGaXgxMpg) discord server.
